expectations.evidence: States 'Without the <Surface> component (or the raw data-surface="fg-bold" attribute), the CSS cascade has no way to know the Button is sitting on a colored surface'
Recommends wrapping with <Surface mode="fg-bold"> and also mentions raw data-surface attribute as alternative
Explains token remapping including brand bold inversion: mentions @layer brand blocks, token remapping table showing --Primary-FG-Bold changing to '#8584fc' (brand bold inversion)
Shows before/after code with <Surface mode="fg-bold"> wrapping, plus alternative raw attribute approach
